themes.label: Creation
themes.summary: This chapter underscores creation, the heavens and earth, or God’s creative ordering work. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 3 verses. Commentary leans on "Where do you need God to 'break forth like waters' against enemies (spiritual, not physical)...". Word-study detail reinforces "מָ֑יִם: of waters - water; figuratively, juice; by euphemism, urine, semen".
